summary: The retrieved evidence does not include any discussion of ofatumumab’s efficacy in multiple sclerosis; it is only referenced alongside other therapies like ocrelizumab, cladribine, and natalizumab. As a result, there is no basis to affirm its effectiveness for MS according to currently available data.
